mapper.sql: id, grade_name, grade_code, enrollment_year, grade_director_id, grade_counselor_id, total_classes, total_students, standard_class_size, status, graduation_year, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted

g.id, g.grade_name, g.grade_code, g.enrollment_year, g.grade_director_id, g.grade_counselor_id, g.total_classes, g.total_students, g.standard_class_size, g.status, g.graduation_year, g.created_at, g.updated_at, g.created_by, g.updated_by, g.deleted, u.real_name as grade_director_name
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM grades g LEFT JOIN users u ON g.grade_director_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0
ORDER BY g.enrollment_year DESC, g.id ASC

SELECT
FROM grades g LEFT JOIN users u ON g.grade_director_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE g.id = #{id} AND g.deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM grades WHERE grade_code = #{gradeCode} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM grades WHERE grade_director_id = #{directorId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY enrollment_year DESC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE grades g SET g.total_classes = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM classes c WHERE c.grade_id = g.id AND c.deleted = 0 ), g.total_students = ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c.student_count), 0) FROM classes c WHERE c.grade_id = g.id AND c.deleted = 0 ), g.updated_at = NOW() WHERE g.id = #{gradeId} AND g.deleted = 0

UPDATE grades g SET g.total_classes = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM classes c WHERE c.grade_id = g.id AND c.deleted = 0 ), g.total_students = ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c.student_count), 0) FROM classes c WHERE c.grade_id = g.id AND c.deleted = 0 ), g.updated_at = NOW() WHERE g.deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM classes WHERE grade_id = #{gradeId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students s INNER JOIN classes c ON s.class_id = c.id WHERE c.grade_id = #{gradeId} AND s.deleted = 0 AND c.deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE grades SET grade_director_id = #{directorId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{gradeId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT c.id as classId, c.class_name as className, c.student_count as studentCount FROM classes c WHERE c.grade_id = #{gradeId} AND c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.class_name ASC
SELECT id FROM grades WHERE grade_director_id = #{directorId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1
